title: christolea mirabilis
intro: Christolea mirabilis, also known as the Tibetan thistle or yang ling, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the Qinghai-Tibet Plateau in China. It is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Christolea mirabilis include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting cardiovascular health. Christolea mirabilis is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various conditions, including arthritis, fever, and digestive issues.
